narrative:
Port Clinton City has 3,743 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
